title: Middleware Routing
content:
# NextJS Revision

*   **RSC:** Default server components that do not ship JS code to the browser.
*   **Caching Layers:** Request Deduplication, Data Cache, Full Route Cache, Router Cache.
*   **PPR:** Combines static page shells with streaming dynamic components inside Suspense.


*   **Middleware Routing Complexity Reference:** Time $O(N)$, Space $O(1)$ auxiliary.
